item.title: 5 Min Gold Eyeshadow Look For Beginners!
item.description: Gold eyeshadow is a staple for any beauty lover, but getting it to look seamless can be tricky. I am breaking down three different ways to wear gold, ranging from a soft halo to a classic smoky wing. These looks are designed for beginners who want a professional finish in just five minutes. Watch to see how a simple brown shadow can transform your entire gaze!

media:content.media:title: 5 Min Gold Eyeshadow Look For Beginners!
media:content.media:description: Gold eyeshadow is a staple for any beauty lover, but getting it to look seamless can be tricky. I am breaking down three different ways to wear gold, ranging from a soft halo to a classic smoky wing. These looks are designed for beginners who want a professional finish in just five minutes. Watch to see how a simple brown shadow can transform your entire gaze!

item.title: Recreating Urvashi Rautela's Cannes makeup Look!
item.description: Celebrity makeup can look intimidating, but I am showing you how to achieve this high-glam look using some of my everyday favorite products. We are diving deep into a soft cut crease technique that works perfectly for hooded eyes. Plus, I am sharing a simple braiding hack that gives you that regal red carpet hairstyle without the struggle. You won't want to miss the final side-by-side comparison!

media:content.media:title: Recreating Urvashi Rautela's Cannes makeup Look!
media:content.media:description: Celebrity makeup can look intimidating, but I am showing you how to achieve this high-glam look using some of my everyday favorite products. We are diving deep into a soft cut crease technique that works perfectly for hooded eyes. Plus, I am sharing a simple braiding hack that gives you that regal red carpet hairstyle without the struggle. You won't want to miss the final side-by-side comparison!

item.title: Cover hyperpigmentation and dark circles for the most natural look!
item.description: If you are tired of your concealer looking grey or heavy, this mixing hack is for you. I am showing you exactly how to combine a peach corrector with your favorite concealer to instantly erase dark circles and spots. The result is a seamless finish that looks just like real skin. See how I target only the areas that need it for a fresh, everyday look!Deets: MILANI | Conceal + Perfect Longwear Concealer ESSENCE | Correct & Conceal Under Eye Brightening Concealer ONE/SIZE BY PATRICK STARRR | Ultimate Blurring Setting Powder @milanicosmetics @essence_cosmetics @onesize #makeuptutorial #makeupartist #makeup #makeuptransformation #concealer

media:content.media:title: Cover hyperpigmentation and dark circles for the most natural look!
media:content.media:description: If you are tired of your concealer looking grey or heavy, this mixing hack is for you. I am showing you exactly how to combine a peach corrector with your favorite concealer to instantly erase dark circles and spots. The result is a seamless finish that looks just like real skin. See how I target only the areas that need it for a fresh, everyday look!Deets: MILANI | Conceal + Perfect Longwear Concealer ESSENCE | Correct & Conceal Under Eye Brightening Concealer ONE/SIZE BY PATRICK STARRR | Ultimate Blurring Setting Powder @milanicosmetics @essence_cosmetics @onesize #makeuptutorial #makeupartist #makeup #makeuptransformation #concealer

item.title: Follow these essential skincare steps before your makeup routine!
item.description: Creating a smooth, professional canvas for your makeup doesn't have to be a mystery. In this tutorial, I reveal the specific steps I take to hydrate, protect, and prime my skin for a long-lasting look. You will see exactly how I prep my under-eye area to prevent concealer from creasing. Let's get that healthy, dewy glow together!

media:content.media:title: Follow these essential skincare steps before your makeup routine!
media:content.media:description: Creating a smooth, professional canvas for your makeup doesn't have to be a mystery. In this tutorial, I reveal the specific steps I take to hydrate, protect, and prime my skin for a long-lasting look. You will see exactly how I prep my under-eye area to prevent concealer from creasing. Let's get that healthy, dewy glow together!
